title: Stateful Pattern Detection + Max-Retry Auto-Suspend
description: Consolidates 8 CTO proposals (CTO-STATEFUL-CLUSTER). Adds stateful keyword pre-screening to route failing test patterns to Claude instead of local models, and caps retries at 5 with CEO-queue suspension on persistent failure.

tasks.title: Add stateful keyword detection to assessTaskComplexity()
tasks.context: assessTaskComplexity() starts at line 1281. The sovereign mode block is lines 1286-1290. The task_target override block is lines 1294-1310. Insert the stateful check between lines 1290 and 1294 (after sovereign mode return, before task_target switch). The function signature is: function assessTaskComplexity(task: AgentTask, deliverables: string[]). The log function signature is: log(c.yellow, message: string). The c.yellow color constant is already available in scope.

tasks.title: Reduce MAX_RETRIES to 5 and add suspended status on final failure
tasks.context: The MAX_RETRIES constant is at line 2260. The final failure block is at lines 2483-2485. The SprintTask interface status union is at line 54. The variable lastReview is declared at line 2263 as `let lastReview: ReviewResult | undefined`. The TaskRun interface at line 106 has a status field — also add 'suspended' to that union if present. taskRun.rejection_reason is already typed as `string | null` (line 120).
